rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying critical contradictions and misalignments between evidence and claims.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for each recommendation, discussing the sign issue, subset reliability, and missing comparisons, thus fully disclosing uncertainties.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), staying within scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential downstream harms and avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits are not, so only major changes have traceability.
